_comment: Original Transformers-style knock-off (no trademarked names/characters). Heroic 'Vanguard' robots that disguise as vehicles vs the evil 'Vypex' legion. 4-beat arc; render with: python -m comfymovies --scene-file prompts/disguised_robots.json --duration 60 --res 480p --quality --seed 4242
title: DISGUISED ROBOTS

scenes.prompt: 1980s cartoon, cel animation, bold outlines, saturated colors: on a neon city street at dusk, three ordinary-looking trucks and a sports car suddenly unfold and transform into towering heroic VANGUARD robots with glowing blue visors and chrome armor, gears and panels rotating, dramatic hero pose, lens flares

1980s cartoon, cel animation, bold outlines: the evil VYPEX legion arrives — menacing purple-and-black robots that were disguised as fighter jets and tanks transform mid-air, red eyes glowing, energy weapons charging, storm clouds gathering over the city skyline

1980s cartoon, cel animation, dynamic action: an epic downtown robot battle, the blue VANGUARD leader and the red-eyed VYPEX warlord clash with energy swords and laser blasts, sparks and explosions, debris flying, low heroic camera angle, motion lines

1980s cartoon, cel animation, triumphant: sunrise over the saved city, the heroic VANGUARD robots stand tall and victorious on the rubble as citizens cheer, the defeated VYPEX retreat into the sky, proud freeze-frame with a lens glint
